name: power-loom
description: Power loom for multi-agent Claude Code orchestration. The Industrial Revolution mechanized weaving in 1784 by replacing skilled hand-craft with deterministic, scalable production; power-loom does the same for multi-agent coordination — turning ad-hoc prompt orchestration into hook-enforced substrate with persistent identity reputation, contract verification, and chaos-tested patterns. Hooks before (deterministic rules), persistence around (cross-session identity + pattern history), verification after (triple-contract output checks). Compensates for LLM non-determinism at the seams without trying to replace the LLM.
